calendar.matters:
CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Sep-10-2019 Off Calendar

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Entry Of Judgment Pursuant To Written Stipulation Of All Parties
Off Calendar Apr-16-2018 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance.

RULING: There being no appearance or objection, the Court adopts the tentative ruling.

PLAINTIFF PMGI FINANCIAL LLC's Motion For Entry Of Judgment Pursuant To Written Stipulation Of All Parties is GRANTED. PMGI is entitled to entry of judgment in its favor and against defendant Melvin Sanders in the amount of $3,277.06 inclusive of costs and attorney's fees and after crediting Mr. Sanders for monies he has paid.

Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: G. Gonzales; Reporter: Christine Jordan, CSR#12262, email: cjordan@sftc.org.

Order signed after hearing.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Feb-06-2018 Case Settled - Set For Crc 3.1385 Hrg On Sep-17-19 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
